name: Lottie Player Crypto Drainer (Ace Drainer DaaS)
description: Compromised @lottiefiles/lottie-player injects Web3 wallet connection prompts on websites to drain crypto assets. 400+ websites confirmed affected.

affected_packages.name: @lottiefiles/lottie-player
affected_packages.note: Published via stolen npm automation token bypassing 2FA. Attack window: Oct 30 2024 8:12PM - 9:57PM GMT.

remediation: Audit website for injected Web3 wallet connection prompts
Check browser console for suspicious network requests
Warn end users who may have connected wallets during the attack window
